auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Gigasheet API key sent in the X-GIGASHEET-TOKEN header. Follow the Authentication guide to create a token, or contact support@gigasheet.com for API access instructions: https://gigasheet.readme.io/reference/authentication

actions.name: describe_dataset
actions.description: Describe one Gigasheet dataset, including status and file metadata.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for describing a Gigasheet dataset.

FileUuid.description: The dataset handle returned by Gigasheet.

FileRows.description: The number of rows in the dataset.

FileSize.description: The file size string returned by Gigasheet.

Status.description: The dataset processing status reported by Gigasheet.

StatusDetails.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by Gigasheet.

DetailedStatus.description: The legacy detailed status string returned by Gigasheet.

Headers.description: The dataset headers returned by Gigasheet.

FieldsTypes.description: The detected data types for dataset columns.

HeaderToColumnMapping.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by Gigasheet.

code.description: The ISO 4217 currency code for the column.

literal.description: The original formula expression stored on the column.

resolved.description: The resolved formula expression returned by Gigasheet.

ColumnInfo.description: Column metadata keyed by Gigasheet column identifier.

Owner.description: The owner identifier for the file.

IsDirectory.description: Whether the entry is a directory.

LastUpdated.description: When the entry was last updated.

LastAccessed.description: When the entry was last accessed.

DeletedAt.description: When the dataset was most recently marked as deleted.

Note.description: The note stored on the file.

ParserUsed.description: The parser used to process the dataset.

Source.description: The source type recorded for the dataset.

Type.description: The numeric file type code returned by Gigasheet.

OperationStatus.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by Gigasheet.

Comments.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by Gigasheet.

Details.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by Gigasheet.

ThreatDetectionStatus.description: An arbitrary JSON object returned by Gigasheet.

ExampleAnalyses.description: Example analyses suggested for the dataset.

outputSchema.description: The dataset metadata response returned by Gigasheet.

actions.name: get_enrichment_credits
actions.description: Get the current enrichment credit usage for the authenticated Gigasheet user.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Gigasheet enrichment credits.

Used.description: The number of enrichment credits already used.

credits.description: The current enrichment credit usage returned by Gigasheet.

outputSchema.description: The enrichment credit response returned by Gigasheet.

actions.name: get_library_path
actions.description: Return the parent directory chain for one Gigasheet file or folder handle.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for a Gigasheet file or folder handle.

user_id.description: The user identifier for the restricted share entry.

items.description: A restricted share entry returned by Gigasheet.

restricted.description: Restricted share entries returned by Gigasheet.

shared.description: Sharing metadata returned for one library entry.

within_quota.description: Whether the file currently fits within the account quota.

items.description: One library entry returned by Gigasheet.

path.description: The ordered path entries returned by Gigasheet.

outputSchema.description: The resolved library path returned by Gigasheet.

actions.name: get_space_used
actions.description: Get the current storage usage reported for the authenticated Gigasheet user.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Gigasheet storage usage.

space_used.description: The amount of storage used by the current Gigasheet user.

outputSchema.description: The storage usage returned by Gigasheet.

actions.name: list_exports
actions.description: List exports owned by the current Gigasheet user across all locations.

page.description: The zero-based page number to request from Gigasheet.

pageSize.description: The number of export entries to return per page.

inputSchema.description: Optional pagination parameters for listing Gigasheet exports.

actions.name: search_library
actions.description: Search Gigasheet library metadata without reading file contents.

searchTerm.description: The search text used to match file metadata in Gigasheet.

items.description: One file metadata field name to include in the search.

fields.description: The metadata fields to search. When omitted, Gigasheet searches owner, file_name, headers, and note.

inputSchema.description: The search payload for querying Gigasheet library metadata.
